cellestial.single.special
=========================

.. py:module:: cellestial.single.special


Submodules
----------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1

   /autoapi/cellestial/single/special/dotplot/index


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   cellestial.single.special.dotplot


Package Contents
----------------

.. py:function:: dotplot(data: anndata.AnnData, keys: collections.abc.Sequence[str], group_by: str, *, threshold: float = 0, variables_name: str = 'gene', value_name: str = 'expression', color_low: str = '#e6e6e6', color_high: str = '#D2042D', fill: bool = False, sort_by: str | collections.abc.Sequence[str] | None = None, sort_order: Literal['ascending', 'descending'] = 'descending', percentage_key: str = 'pct_exp', mean_key: str = 'avg_exp', tooltips: Literal['none'] | collections.abc.Sequence[str] | lets_plot.plot.core.FeatureSpec | None = None, interactive: bool = False, **geom_kwargs) -> lets_plot.plot.core.PlotSpec

   Dotplot.

   :param data: The AnnData object of the single cell data.
   :type data: AnnData
   :param keys: The variable keys or names to include in the dotplot.
   :type keys: Sequence[str]
   :param group_by: The key to group the data by.
   :type group_by: str
   :param threshold: The expression threshold to consider a gene as expressed.
   :type threshold: float, default=0
   :param variables_name: The name of the variable column in the long format.
   :type variables_name: str, default='gene'
   :param value_name: The name of the value column in the long format.
   :type value_name: str, default="expression"
   :param color_low: The low color for the gradient.
   :type color_low: str, default='#e6e6e6'
   :param color_high: The high color for the gradient.
   :type color_high: str, default='#D2042D'
   :param fill: Whether to use fill aesthetic instead of color, by default False.
   :type fill: bool, optional
   :param sort_by: The column to sort the results by, by default None.
   :type sort_by: str | None
   :param sort_order: The sort order, either 'ascending' or 'descending'.
   :type sort_order: str, default='descending'
   :param percentage_key: The name of the percentage column.
   :type percentage_key: str, default='pct_exp'
   :param mean_key: The name of the mean expression column.
   :type mean_key: str, default='avg_exp'
   :param tooltips: Tooltips to show when hovering over the geom.
                    Accepts Sequence[str] or result of `layer_tooltips()` for more complex tooltips.
                    Use 'none' to disable tooltips.
   :type tooltips: Literal['none'] | Sequence[str] | FeatureSpec | None, default=None
   :param show_tooltips: Whether to show tooltips.
   :type show_tooltips: bool, default=True
   :param interactive: Whether to make the plot interactive.
   :type interactive: bool, default=False
   :param \*\*geom_kwargs: Additional keyword arguments for the geom_point layer.
   :type \*\*geom_kwargs: Any

   :returns: Dotplot.
   :rtype: PlotSpec
